blockers.title: Resolve migration, deletion, whitelist, and post-merge proof inventory before final completion
Run merge-result rebuild, installed-wheel conformance, deletion integrity, and generated-artifact freshness gates after all milestone merges
Instrument importlib, __import__, lazy __getattr__, __all__, entrypoint loading, and handler registration against deleted legacy paths
Freeze and resolve all legacy allowlist rows before M6 merge; merge-review rechartering requires independent evidence
